name: angr
description: Python framework for binary analysis and symbolic execution. Tool: https://angr.io. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #118 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map angr output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved angr output file to parse instead of running it live.
